skills.name: api-gateway
skills.description:
A unified API gateway powered by Maton.ai that connects 100+ popular external services through managed OAuth — no need to handle authentication yourself.

## Supported Services

Google Workspace (Gmail, Sheets, Drive, Calendar, Docs), Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive, Excel), Slack, GitHub, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Stripe, Airtable, Jira, Trello, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, and 100+ more.

## Key Capabilities

- Call any authorized service's native API using a single `MATON_API_KEY`
- Supports OAuth2, API Key, Basic Auth, and other connection methods
- Manage connections (create, list, delete)
- All HTTP methods supported (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)

## Typical Use Cases

- Automate cross-platform workflows (e.g. read Gmail → write to Notion → notify Slack)
- Bulk-manage CRM data (HubSpot contacts, Salesforce records)
- Automate GitHub repo management and issue processing
- Read/write Google Sheets or Airtable for data aggregation and reporting
- Send messages or alerts to Slack channels
- Manage Stripe subscriptions and payments

## How to Use

Set the `MATON_API_KEY` environment variable, then make requests to `https://gateway.maton.ai/{service}/{native-api-path}`. OAuth authorization must be completed at maton.ai first.

skills.name: stock-analysis
skills.description:
A professional US stock and cryptocurrency analysis tool powered by Yahoo Finance data, featuring 8-dimension scoring, trend scanning, dividend analysis, portfolio management, and an early signal/rumor radar.

## Key Capabilities

- **Stock/crypto analysis** — 8-dimension composite score (Earnings Surprise 30%, Fundamentals 20%, Analyst Sentiment 20%, Historical Reaction 10%, Market Context 10%, Sector Strength 15%, Momentum 15%, Sentiment 10%), outputs BUY/HOLD/SELL signals
- **Hot Scanner** — scans trending stocks and crypto across CoinGecko, Yahoo Finance, Google News, and Twitter/X; ranks by mention count
- **Rumor Scanner** — detects M&A rumors, insider trading activity, analyst rating changes, and Twitter whispers; scores each signal by market impact (1–10); best run before market open
- **Dividend analysis** — yield, payout ratio, 5-year CAGR, consecutive growth years, safety score; ideal for screening income stocks
- **Watchlist + price alerts** — set target prices, stop losses, and signal-change notifications
- **Portfolio management** — holdings summary, cost basis, and return tracking

## Supported Crypto

BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE, and other Top 20 coins (use `-USD` suffix, e.g. `BTC-USD`).

## Typical Use Cases

- Run Rumor Scanner pre-market to catch M&A and insider signals early
- Compare multiple stocks side by side (e.g. AAPL vs MSFT vs GOOGL)
- Screen dividend stocks for an income-focused portfolio
- Set price alerts to automatically monitor key levels
- Track crypto market momentum and trending coins

> **Disclaimer:** For informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Data from Yahoo Finance with ~15–20 min delay.

skills.name: reddit-readonly
skills.description:
Browse and search Reddit in read-only mode using Reddit's public JSON endpoints — no account needed, no posting, voting, or any write operations.

## Key Capabilities

- Browse subreddit posts sorted by hot / new / top / controversial / rising, with time range filtering
- Search posts by keyword within a subreddit or across all of Reddit
- Fetch full comment threads for a given post (configurable depth and limit)
- Get recent comments stream from a subreddit
- **Multi-condition filtering (`find` command)** — search multiple subreddits simultaneously with include/exclude keywords, minimum score, time window, and result limits

## Typical Use Cases

- **Market research** — find genuine user feedback about a product or service in relevant communities
- **Content monitoring** — scan how a topic is trending on Reddit and track sentiment over time
- **Competitor analysis** — understand how users talk about competing products, what they praise or complain about
- **Content ideation** — discover what questions your target audience cares most about
- **Sales/partnership prospecting** — filter posts from the last 48 hours with clear intent signals and generate a shortlist of links to reply to manually

> **Note:** This tool only reads data. All replies and interactions must be done manually by the user on Reddit.

skills.name: skill-builder
skills.description:
Guides you through building or improving Claude skills (plugins) from scratch — covering structure design, content writing, and quality assurance.

## Key Capabilities

- **Guided skill structure design** — follows best practices (SKILL.md + auxiliary files + references/ directory) for modular, maintainable skills
- **Progressive disclosure architecture** — teaches how to layer content so SKILL.md stays short (30–50 lines) while detailed docs load on demand
- **Description writing guidance** — helps craft concise, action-verb-first descriptions that allow the AI to accurately decide when to trigger the skill
- **Anti-pattern detection** — identifies and fixes common mistakes (over-explaining, inlining templates, undeclared file operations, vague instructions)
- **Pre-publish quality review** — simulates the AI reading the skill fresh and checks whether every instruction is clear and necessary

## Skill Structure Convention

```
skill-name/
├── SKILL.md         (core instructions — keep it short)
├── [topic].md       (on-demand detail files)
└── references/      (heavy docs, optional)
```

## Typical Use Cases

- You have a repetitive workflow and want to turn it into an automated skill
- You want to package domain-specific procedures into a reusable plugin
- You already have a skill but it triggers incorrectly or its instructions are unclear
- You want to learn how to design token-efficient skill structures

## How to Use

Describe what skill you want to build, and Skill Builder will walk you through the entire design process and help write the SKILL.md content.

skills.name: docx
skills.description:
Full Microsoft Word (.docx) file handling — create richly formatted documents from scratch, edit existing files at the XML level, and extract content in various formats.

## Creating New Documents

- Headings, body text, paragraphs, ordered and unordered lists
- Tables with borders, shading, and precise column widths
- Image insertion with alt text
- Headers and footers with automatic page numbers
- Multi-column layouts
- Auto-generated table of contents with hyperlinks
- External hyperlinks and internal bookmark navigation
- Footnotes and page breaks
- Custom styles (font, size, color, spacing) that override Word's built-in defaults

## Editing Existing Documents

- Find and replace text
- Insert or delete paragraphs
- Track Changes with proper insertion/deletion markup
- Add comments and threaded replies
- Accept or reject another author's revisions
- Insert or replace images

## Reading and Extracting

- Extract full text including tracked-change content
- Convert to Markdown
- Render each page as an image
- Convert to PDF

## Typical Use Cases

- Auto-generate reports, memos, contracts, and letters
- Batch-update Word templates with variable data
- Produce tracked-changes review versions for legal or editorial teams
- Export structured data as a formatted Word table
- Migrate legacy `.doc` files to `.docx`

## How to Use

Describe the document you need, or provide an existing `.docx` file path and explain what changes to make.

skills.name: pptx
skills.description:
Professional PowerPoint (.pptx) creation and editing — build visually polished slide decks from scratch or modify existing presentations, with built-in design aesthetics guidance.

## Creating New Presentations

- Flexible slide layouts: two-column, icon+text rows, data card grids, large stat callouts, timeline/process flows, and more
- 10 curated professional color palettes to choose from, or define your own
- Thoughtful font pairings (headline + body font combinations)
- Precise positioning of images, icons, and shapes
- Speaker notes

## Editing Existing Presentations

- Modify text content across slides
- Replace images and adjust layouts/styles
- Extract all slide text for summarization or translation

## Built-in Design Quality Assurance

- Converts slides to images and visually inspects for layout issues (text overflow, overlapping elements, low contrast, insufficient margins)
- Enforces the "every slide needs a visual element" principle — no plain bullet-text slides
- Design anti-pattern checklist (e.g. never use underline accent lines under titles, a hallmark of AI-generated slides)

## Typical Use Cases

- Build product roadmap presentations or investor pitch decks
- Turn data analysis results into clear, visual slides
- Quickly generate reports from a company template
- Extract text from an existing PPT for summarization or translation
- Batch-update text across many slides (e.g. product names, dates)

## How to Use

Tell the AI the topic and number of slides, whether you have an existing template, and any brand color requirements. More context yields better results.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description:
Comprehensive PDF file handling — read, create, merge, split, extract, encrypt, watermark, and OCR scan PDFs, covering all common operations.

## Reading and Extracting

- Extract full text with layout preservation
- Extract tables as structured data or Excel
- Extract embedded images
- Read metadata (title, author, creation date, etc.)
- OCR scanned PDFs (image-based PDF → searchable text)

## Merging and Splitting

- Merge multiple PDFs into one
- Split a PDF by page range
- Extract specific pages into a new file

## Creating New PDFs

- Generate formatted PDF reports from text or data
- Multi-page documents with headings, body text, lists, and tables
- Correct subscript/superscript rendering for chemical formulas and math

## Editing and Processing

- Rotate pages
- Add watermarks (text or image)
- Encrypt/decrypt with user and owner passwords
- Fill PDF forms

## Typical Use Cases

- Merge multiple contracts or reports into a single archived PDF
- Extract numerical data from invoice or financial report PDFs for analysis
- OCR a scanned contract and pull out key clauses
- Batch-add watermarks (e.g. "Confidential", company logo) to PDFs
- Password-protect a PDF before sending to external partners
- Auto-fill PDF application forms

## How to Use

Provide the PDF file path and tell the AI what operation you need.

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description:
Professional Excel (.xlsx) file handling — data analysis, formula modeling, formatting, and financial model standards, covering everything from simple data cleanup to complex financial models.

## Data Analysis and Reading

- Read single or multi-sheet data with column selection, data type control, and date parsing
- Statistical analysis (mean, distribution, correlation, etc.)
- Efficient processing of large files

## Creating and Editing Excel Files

- Write data and apply cell formatting (font, color, borders, alignment)
- Use native Excel formulas (SUM, AVERAGE, VLOOKUP, IF, etc.) — never hardcode calculated values
- Insert/delete rows and columns, merge cells
- Manage multiple sheets and cross-sheet references
- Create charts; recalculate formulas via LibreOffice script to produce accurate values

## Financial Model Standards

Built-in industry conventions:

- **Color coding** — blue = hardcoded inputs, black = formulas, green = cross-sheet links, red = external file links
- **Number formats** — currency `$#,##0`, percentages `0.0%`, valuation multiples `0.0x`, negatives in parentheses
- **Centralized assumptions** — all inputs in a dedicated section, referenced by formulas rather than hardcoded
- **Zero formula errors on delivery** — auto-detects and reports `#REF!`, `#DIV/0!`, `#VALUE!`, `#N/A`, and other errors

## Typical Use Cases

- Clean and restructure messy CSV or Excel data
- Build three-statement financial models (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)
- Export database query results as formatted Excel reports
- Batch-update data across many Excel files
- Consolidate data from multiple Excel files into a single summary sheet
- Analyze sales data and produce trend charts

## How to Use

Provide the `.xlsx` file path (or describe what to create) and tell the AI what operation you need. For financial models, mention your industry and modeling objective.

skills.name: markdown-to-epub
skills.description:
Convert Markdown documents into professionally formatted EPUB3 ebook files, readable on all major ebook readers and uploadable to Kindle.

## Key Capabilities

- **Auto-parses Markdown structure** — H1 headers become chapter boundaries, H2 becomes section headings, table of contents is generated automatically
- **Full Markdown element support** — headings (H1–H6), bold/italic, clickable hyperlinks, ordered/unordered lists (including nested), code blocks (monospace font + styled background), inline code, tables (styled header + zebra-striped rows), blockquotes, and horizontal rules
- **Professional typography** — code blocks with blue accent border and gray background, tables with blue header and white text, responsive layout for all screen sizes
- **Custom metadata** — book title (defaults to first H1), author name, language, publication date
- **EPUB3 standard** — compatible with all modern ebook readers

## Compatible Readers

Apple Books, Amazon Kindle (via Kindle for Mac/iOS/Android), Google Play Books, Kobo, and any standard EPUB reader.

## Typical Use Cases

- Publish technical documentation or tutorials as an ebook for offline reading
- Bundle a collection of blog posts into an EPUB for archiving and sharing
- Convert research notes or reports into EPUB format and send to Kindle
- Save a conversation's summary or output as a permanent EPUB
- Package multi-chapter writing drafts into ebook format

## How to Use

1. Paste Markdown text directly into the conversation, or
2. Provide a `.md` file path

**Example:** "Convert this Markdown to EPUB: [paste content]"

skills.name: youtube-transcript
skills.description:
Fetch transcript text from any YouTube video — prioritizing manual captions, falling back to auto-generated subtitles, and offering Whisper AI transcription as a last resort when no captions exist.

## Key Capabilities

- **Smart source selection** — tries manual subtitles first (highest quality) → auto-generated subtitles → local Whisper AI transcription (requires user confirmation before downloading audio)
- **Multi-language support** — lists all available subtitle languages and can download a specific one
- **Clean output** — automatically deduplicates VTT format's repeated lines (a quirk of YouTube auto-captions) and saves a clean plain-text `.txt` file
- **Smart file naming** — output file is automatically named after the video title
- **Auto-installs yt-dlp** if not already present

## Typical Use Cases

- Get the full transcript of a lecture or talk for summarization or note-taking
- Download subtitles from a tutorial video for quick reference
- Convert interview or podcast videos to text for content analysis
- Extract video content for translation
- Generate a transcript for a self-recorded video with no captions
- Turn video content into raw material for articles or documentation

## How to Use

Provide a YouTube URL and say you want the transcript.

**Example:** `Get me the transcript for this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxx`

> **Note:** Whisper transcription requires downloading the audio file first (file size shown upfront) and may need the openai-whisper model (~1–3 GB one-time install).

skills.name: competitive-ads-extractor
skills.description:
Scrape competitor ads from Facebook Ad Library, LinkedIn, and other ad platforms, then analyze what messaging, creative patterns, and strategies are actually working in your market.

## Key Capabilities

- **Ad extraction** — pulls all currently running ads from a competitor on Facebook Ad Library, LinkedIn, etc.
- **Screenshot capture** — saves every ad as an image file, building a searchable competitor creative library
- **Messaging analysis** — identifies the core pain points, use cases, and value propositions competitors emphasize in their copy
- **Ad categorization** — groups ads by theme, target audience, and format (static image / video / carousel)
- **Pattern recognition** — surfaces high-frequency winning creative formulas (before/after comparisons, big-number stats, social proof, etc.)
- **Actionable insights** — explains why certain ads likely perform well and gives specific recommendations you can apply to your own campaigns

## Analysis Dimensions

| Dimension | What's analyzed |
|---|---|
| Messaging | Pain points, competitive positioning, value propositions, audience segments |
| Creative | Visual style, video vs. static ratio, color and branding |
| Copy | Headline structures, CTA patterns, copy length and tone |
| Strategy | Seasonal campaigns, launch cadence, retargeting patterns |

## Typical Use Cases

- Research competitor ad strategies before launching your own campaign
- Analyze 5 key competitors and map overall market positioning
- Find pain points competitors haven't addressed as a differentiation angle
- Distill reusable copy formulas from a competitor's highest-frequency ads
- Track competitor ad changes monthly to monitor strategic shifts

## How to Use

Tell the AI which competitor (company name) to analyze, on which platform (Facebook / LinkedIn), and what aspect of their strategy you care about most.

> **Note:** For research and inspiration only. Do not copy competitor ad creative directly.

skills.name: lead-research-assistant
skills.description:
Intelligently identifies and qualifies potential leads for your business by analyzing your product or service, building an ideal customer profile, and delivering a prioritized prospect list with personalized outreach strategies for each lead.

## Key Capabilities

- **Automatic product understanding** — if run from a code repository, reads the codebase to understand what you're building; otherwise analyzes your description to extract core value
- **Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) definition** — infers target industries, company sizes, geographies, tech stacks, and pain points based on what your product solves
- **Lead research and discovery** — finds companies matching your criteria, looking for intent signals like job postings, funding announcements, tech stack usage, and recent news
- **Lead scoring (1–10)** — ranks companies by fit score with a clear explanation of the reasoning
- **Per-lead action plans** — each lead includes company website, target decision-maker role/title, LinkedIn URL (when available), a company-specific value proposition, suggested outreach approach, and conversation starters
- **Follow-up support** — export results to CSV for CRM import, or generate personalized outreach email drafts

## Typical Use Cases

- SaaS cold start: find the first batch of most-likely-to-pay customers
- Build a target account list for account-based marketing (ABM)
- Consulting or services firm looking for new project opportunities
- Automatically identify B2B prospects from a codebase without manual research
- Rapid market exploration before entering a new segment
- Find potential partners or channel distributors

## How to Use

1. Describe your product/service (or let the AI read your codebase)
2. Specify preferred industry, geography, and company size
3. Tell the AI how many leads you need

**Example:** "I'm building a tool that masks sensitive data in AI coding assistant queries. Find 10 fintech companies that use Copilot or Cursor and handle sensitive data."

skills.name: twitter-algorithm-optimizer
skills.description:
Analyze and rewrite your tweets for maximum reach and engagement, based on a deep understanding of Twitter's open-source recommendation algorithm — not just better wording, but structuring content so the algorithm actually amplifies it.

## How the Algorithm Works

Twitter's recommendation system uses four key models:

| Model | What it does |
|---|---|
| **Real-graph** | Predicts interaction likelihood between you and your followers; higher engagement = wider distribution |
| **SimClusters** | Identifies interest communities; content that resonates deeply with a tight niche gets amplified |
| **TwHIN** | Knowledge graph of your account identity; off-topic content reduces distribution |
| **Tweepcred** | Account credibility score that affects long-term distribution weight |

## Key Capabilities

- **Tweet optimization and rewriting** — diagnoses what's algorithmically weak in your draft and rewrites it to trigger stronger engagement signals
- **Engagement signal design** — different content structures for different goals (likes vs. replies vs. retweets vs. bookmarks)
- **Underperformance diagnosis** — explains why a specific tweet didn't perform well with concrete improvement suggestions
- **Negative signal avoidance** — flags content likely to cause blocks or reports that would hurt future reach
- **Content strategy recommendations** — long-term account growth advice grounded in how the algorithm actually works

## Typical Use Cases

- Maximize reach before publishing important content (product launches, event announcements)
- Diagnose why a tweet's engagement rate was unexpectedly low
- Build topical authority in a specific vertical (developer community, startup founders, product managers, etc.)
- Optimize content for a specific niche community
- Grow personal brand influence consistently over time

## How to Use

Share your tweet draft, describe your target audience, and specify what kind of engagement you want (discussion / retweets / saves). The AI will analyze it and deliver an optimized version with the reasoning explained.

> **Note:** This skill is for algorithm-driven content optimization. General grammar or tone edits don't require it.

skills.name: video-downloader
skills.description:
Download YouTube videos with full control over quality and format, including audio-only extraction as MP3.

## Options

| Option | Choices |
|---|---|
| **Quality** | `best` (highest available), `1080p`, `720p`, `480p`, `360p`, `worst` (smallest file) |
| **Format** | `mp4` (default, most compatible), `webm`, `mkv` |
| **Audio only** | Extracts audio as MP3 — ideal for podcasts, lectures, or music |

Output files are automatically named after the video title. `yt-dlp` is auto-installed if not already present.

## Typical Use Cases

- Download tutorial videos for offline viewing
- Extract the audio track from a talk, podcast, or music video as MP3
- Download a lower-quality version to save disk space
- Save a video in a specific format for later editing

## How to Use

Provide a YouTube URL and specify the quality and format you want.

**Examples:**
- "Download this video in 1080p: [URL]"
- "Extract audio only as MP3: [URL]"
- "Download in 720p WebM format to /Downloads: [URL]"

> **Note:** Default save path is `/mnt/user-data/outputs/` (can be overridden). Downloads single videos only — playlists are skipped by default.

skills.name: tailored-resume-generator
skills.description:
Tailors your resume to a specific job description, highlighting the most relevant experience, skills, and achievements to maximize your chances of passing ATS screening and landing an interview.

## Full Tailoring Process

1. Analyzes the job description to extract must-have qualifications, key skills, soft skills, and ATS keywords
2. Maps your experience to each requirement, identifying direct matches and transferable skills
3. Reorders resume bullet points so the most relevant content appears first
4. Naturally incorporates exact keywords from the job description throughout the text
5. Quantifies achievements with numbers, percentages, and scale using action verbs
6. Produces ATS-compliant formatting (no tables, graphics, or complex layouts)

## Additional Support

- **Gap analysis** — flags requirements not fully met and suggests ways to address them
- **Strengths analysis** — identifies your most competitive differentiators
- **Interview prep tips** — recommends STAR stories to prepare based on job requirements
- **Cover letter hooks** — provides 2–3 opening line ideas
- **Multiple versions** — generates differentiated resumes for different roles

## Special Scenarios Supported

- **Career transitions** — emphasizes transferable skills, uses functional or hybrid format
- **Recent graduates** — leads with education, highlights projects, internships, coursework
- **Senior executives** — focuses on leadership, strategic impact, board memberships
- **Technical roles** — prominently features tech stack, GitHub, portfolio links
- **Creative roles** — advises on portfolio presentation alongside the resume

## Typical Use Cases

- Tailor your existing resume to a specific job posting
- Generate a resume from scratch based on a JD and your background
- Quickly create multiple differentiated versions when applying to several roles
- Reframe past experience for a career pivot
- Audit an existing resume for ATS compliance

## How to Use

1. Paste the target job description
2. Provide your background (existing resume, or a description of your work history, education, and skills)
3. The AI outputs a complete tailored resume plus optimization recommendations

> **Note:** This tool only improves how your experience is presented — all content must be truthful.
